title: IBM Announces New AI-Powered Cybersecurity Tools
body: IBM has announced an expanded portfolio of AI-powered cybersecurity products, positioning the company to compete more aggressively in a rapidly evolving market where enterprises are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence to defend against automated cyber threats.

title: Cycurion Acquires Secuvant, Supercharging AI-Driven Cybersecurity with Automated, Scalable Threat Defense – Perfectly Complements HavenX Platform

title: Sophos Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Protection
body: Sophos, a global cybersecurity leader, today announced it has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner ® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Protection, marking the 17th consecutive report in which Sophos has been recognized as a Leader.
